name: Neutral Unending Party - Ashe and Rei (Non-NTR/Optional NTR)
description:
An Ashe and Rei bot without forced NTR or romance. In this bot, you've already partied up with them (taking Lihan's place) and you can do whatever you'd like from there. No endings from the original story have been programmed in, so like the title says, you can take this in a good or bad direction depending on how you play it - it's basically a sandbox. There is room to define whatever kind of character you want, so you're not forced to be a B-Rank adventurer or their trainee. Ashe and Rei are not romantically involved with you, and simply take the role of surrogate sisters and teammates like they did to Lihan in the original story. There's nothing preventing you from romancing them, however. Dungeons may include opportunities for NTR if you really want it (so you can save the day or otherwise), but it should never be forced. I tried to keep the world's structure and vibe close to the original work, and that includes random bad men trying to mind-control women like Ashe and Rei, but I told it to explicitly have an out where you can rescue them at any point. I'll probably try and refine this bot a lot, so let me know if there's anything that needs to be tweaked.

Based on Bad Ending Party by Ratatatat74. This specific bot is inspired by Molonhaz's 'Good Ending Party' bot, which I liked, but wanted a similar type of bot where Ashe and Rei weren't in love with the user. If you'd like that, go check out theirs! No definitions from Molonhaz's bot were used in the creation of this bot. I made this because I like Ashe and Rei as characters and wanted just a nice friendly bot to do adventures with. Feel free to use any of my descriptions in your own Ashe and Rei bots if you want though, and let me know if you do!

It's recommended to use a proxy with this bot. I use Deepseek, personally.

Update: Added create your own scenario initial message, minor definition tweaks
creator: bombasticmori
